LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverOrgan.label: Abyssal Generic Organ
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverOrgan.description: A universal replacement organ used for missing parts without a dedicated abyssal graft.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverBrain.label: Abyssal Cortex
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverBrain.description: A half-fluid neural core that glows in the dark and constantly receives whispers from higher dimensions.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverEye.label: Voidgaze Ocular Implant
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverEye.description: A pupil-less obsidian-black eye capable of locking onto structural weaknesses and psychic traces.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverEar.label: Delusion Receptors
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverEar.description: Mutated auditory channels lined with psychic cilia that capture subtle mental waves.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverNose.label: Bloodhound Olfactory Sensor
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverNose.description: High-dimensional mucus membranes that filter stench and detect fear and blood.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverJaw.label: Bone-Crusher Mandibles
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverJaw.description: A reinforced jawline fitted with interlocking armor-cracking fangs.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverTongue.label: Whispering Tendril
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverTongue.description: A tentacular tongue that emits infrasonic pulses acting directly on the brainstem.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverNeck.label: Aberrant Jugular
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverNeck.description: Neck arteries wrapped in dense biological scales, heavily reinforcing a critical weak point.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverShoulder.label: Scourge-Grafted Appendage
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverShoulder.description: Muscle bundles replaced by high-tensile abyssal fibers that can shift between hand and blade function.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverSpine.label: Abyssal Marrow-Spine
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverSpine.description: A living metallic spine that hijacks central motor control and amplifies body output.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverLeg.label: Shadow-Tread Hoof
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverLeg.description: Reverse-jointed limb design and silent pads dramatically improve speed and stealth movement.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverHeart.label: Heart of the Abyss
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverHeart.description: A black-blood circulation core with extreme coagulation behavior that suppresses fatal blood loss.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverLung.label: Gloom-Breathing Sac
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverLung.description: A spore-filled respiratory organ that filters toxins and sustains function in hazardous atmospheres.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverKidney.label: Blackblood Filtration Gland
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverKidney.description: Purifies the bloodstream and fortifies resistance against ordinary disease pressure.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverLiver.label: Entropic Synthesis Liver
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverLiver.description: Converts metabolism and neural heat into more stable entropic circulation.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverStomach.label: Ravenous Void-Maw
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssweaverStomach.description: A corrosive abyssal digestive sac that handles dangerous intake with minimal poisoning risk.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_DelusionBackflowBuff.label: Void Overdrive
LanguageData.VPEMYX_DelusionBackflowBuff.description: The body is driven by unstable void impulses.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_DistortedMetabolism.label: Distorted Metabolism
LanguageData.VPEMYX_DistortedMetabolism.description: The flesh writhes to seal injuries by burning neural heat.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_EmbraceGloom.label: Embrace Gloom
LanguageData.VPEMYX_EmbraceGloom.description: The psycaster's mind is synchronized with annihilating darkness and resists entity-born dread.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_FleshFrenzyBuff.label: Flesh Frenzy
LanguageData.VPEMYX_FleshFrenzyBuff.description: Void-touched shamblers move and kill with unnatural efficiency.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CorpseThreadsCounter.label: Corpse Threads Counter
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CorpseThreadsCounter.description: Tracks how many corpses this caster has revived through Corpse Threads.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_MindDrained.label: Mind Drained
LanguageData.VPEMYX_MindDrained.description: The mind has been completely siphoned, leaving only an empty shell.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_MindSiphonSensitivity.label: Void Neural Amplification
LanguageData.VPEMYX_MindSiphonSensitivity.description: Psychic sensitivity gained by devouring psylinked neural structures.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CognitiveHazardAura.label: Cognitive Hazard
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CognitiveHazardAura.description: This psycaster emits memetic contamination that tears at nearby cognition.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CognitiveHazardVictim.label: Cognitive Contamination
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CognitiveHazardVictim.description: The brain is being shredded by anomalous whispers and consciousness is collapsing.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_VoidSight.label: Void Sight
LanguageData.VPEMYX_VoidSight.description: Vision synchronized with the void: immune to night terror penalties and darkness limitations.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_FleshMoldingTier1.label: Grafted Predation
LanguageData.VPEMYX_FleshMoldingTier1.description: The grafted aberration rapidly stitches injuries and devours nearby fresh corpses.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_FleshMoldingTier2.label: Wailing Mass Resonance
LanguageData.VPEMYX_FleshMoldingTier2.description: The mound crawls slowly while endlessly regenerating and hunting with consume leaps.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_FleshMoldingTier3.label: Legion Assault Core
LanguageData.VPEMYX_FleshMoldingTier3.description: The lord of legion gains speed when wounded, suppresses nearby minds, and lashes enemies with massive bone volleys.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssalAtrocityCore.label: Abyssal Atrocity Core
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssalAtrocityCore.description: A pseudo-divine living core that crushes space, drags prey, and projects catastrophic void force.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssalDamageTransferLink.label: Abyssal Damage Transfer
LanguageData.VPEMYX_AbyssalDamageTransferLink.descrip: The summoner is linked to abyssal flesh. Incoming damage is redirected to the linked atrocity.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Corruption.label: Corruption
LanguageData.VPEMYX_Corruption.description: Void corruption begins in the brain or core, then progressively spreads through other body parts.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CorruptionLesion.label: Corruption Lesion
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CorruptionLesion.description: Corruption has infiltrated local tissue and is worsening over time.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CellularMalignancy.label: Cellular Malignancy
LanguageData.VPEMYX_CellularMalignancy.description: Target cells enter irreversible collapse, continuously generating malignant tumors and accelerating existing lesions.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_MalignantTumor.label: Malignant Tumor
LanguageData.VPEMYX_MalignantTumor.description: Extreme tissue overgrowth that continuously degrades local function.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_WailingAuraVictim.label: Wailing Field Exposure
LanguageData.VPEMYX_WailingAuraVictim.description: The victim is overwhelmed by resonant agony from a wailing flesh-mound.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_WailingDevourPredator.label: Ravenous Digestion
LanguageData.VPEMYX_WailingDevourPredator.description: While digesting prey, this aberration becomes highly resilient and regenerates rapidly.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionMomentum.label: Legion Momentum
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionMomentum.description: Taking damage drives the legion aberration into a faster pursuit state. Stacks up to 5.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionDreadField.label: Legion Dread Field
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionDreadField.description: The oppressive aura of the legion aberration is grinding down cognition and coordination.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionRiftBurn.label: Rift Laceration
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionRiftBurn.description: Residual claws of void-slashed terrain keep tearing at the victim.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionScreamShock.label: Legion Scream Shock
LanguageData.VPEMYX_LegionScreamShock.description: The roar forces catastrophic sensory and motor disruption.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_VoidReturnTimer.label: Void Tether
LanguageData.VPEMYX_VoidReturnTimer.description: A temporary void tether sustaining this summoned entity.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_VoidAscensionCocoon.label: Void Ascension Metamorphosis
LanguageData.VPEMYX_VoidAscensionCocoon.description: Ultimate void power is rewriting this body. The target remains in prolonged coma until transformation completes.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_VoidAvatar.label: Void Avatar
LanguageData.VPEMYX_VoidAvatar.description: Irreversible transformation complete. This being is no longer human, but a vessel of the void.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_BrainWithering.label: Brain Withering
LanguageData.VPEMYX_BrainWithering.description: Void whispers from the Domain of Silence are continuously eroding this target's neural core.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_DomainOfSilenceChannel.label: Domain of Silence
LanguageData.VPEMYX_DomainOfSilenceChannel.descriptio: The caster is channeling the Domain of Silence in place, eroding enemy brains and suppressing technological firepower.
LanguageData.VPEMYX_DarkBeaconChannel.label: Dark Beacon
LanguageData.VPEMYX_DarkBeaconChannel.description: The caster becomes a void beacon. A rift continuously deploys entity forces into reality until channeling is interrupted.
